% LuaLaTeX template for Knuth-Plass comparison
% Generated by scripts/compare-tex.ts — do not edit by hand.
%
% Placeholders replaced at runtime:
%   __FONT_PATH__   — absolute path to the .ttf file
%   __FONT_SIZE__   — font size in TeX pt (e.g. 12.80)
%   __LINE_WIDTH__  — \hsize in TeX pt (e.g. 258.21)
%   __PARAGRAPH__   — the paragraph text
\documentclass{article}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{luacode}

\setmainfont[
  Path=__FONT_PATH_DIR__/,
  __RAW_FEATURE__
  Ligatures=NoCommon,
  Kerning=On
]{__FONT_FILE__}

\begin{document}

% ── Font size ──
\fontsize{__FONT_SIZE__pt}{__LEADING__pt}\selectfont

% ── Line width ──
\hsize=__LINE_WIDTH__pt
\textwidth=\hsize
\linewidth=\hsize

% ── Override fontdimen to match app's space stretch/shrink ──
% App: stretch = 0.5 × natural, shrink = 0.2 × natural
% fontdimen2 = interword space, fontdimen3 = stretch, fontdimen4 = shrink
% LuaTeX/OpenType defaults: stretch = space/2, shrink = space/3
% We need: stretch = space * 0.5 (same as default), shrink = space * 0.2
\directlua{
  local fid = font.current()
  local fd = font.getfont(fid)
  if fd and fd.parameters then
    local sp = fd.parameters.space or 0
    fd.parameters.space_stretch = sp * 0.5
    fd.parameters.space_shrink  = sp * 0.2
    font.setfont(fid, fd)
  end
}

% ── KP parameters matching the app ──
\linepenalty=10
\hyphenpenalty=50
\exhyphenpenalty=50
\adjdemerits=3000
\doublehyphendemerits=3000
\finalhyphendemerits=5000
\widowpenalty=50
\clubpenalty=0
\brokenpenalty=0

% Tolerance: app rejects ratio > 6, badness = 100*|r|^3 = 21600
\tolerance=21600
% Disable first pass without hyphenation to match app behavior
\pretolerance=-1

% Disable hyphenation entirely (app runs without hyphenation for this test)
\lefthyphenmin=100
\righthyphenmin=100

% No paragraph indentation
\parindent=0pt

% No Hz font expansion (we compare non-Hz mode)
\adjustspacing=0

% ── Lua callback: extract per-line text ──
\begin{luacode}
local GLYPH = node.id("glyph")
local GLUE  = node.id("glue")
local HLIST = node.id("hlist")
local DISC  = node.id("disc")

-- Map Unicode ligature codepoints to their decomposed forms
local ligature_map = {
  [0xFB00] = "ff",
  [0xFB01] = "fi",
  [0xFB02] = "fl",
  [0xFB03] = "ffi",
  [0xFB04] = "ffl",
  [0xFB05] = "st",
  [0xFB06] = "st",
}

local function char_to_text(ch)
  if ligature_map[ch] then return ligature_map[ch] end
  return unicode.utf8.char(ch)
end

local function collect_text(head)
  local buf = {}
  local n = head
  while n do
    local id = n.id
    if id == GLYPH then
      local ch = n.char
      if ch and ch > 0 then
        buf[#buf + 1] = char_to_text(ch)
      end
    elseif id == GLUE then
      buf[#buf + 1] = " "
    elseif id == DISC then
      if n.replace then
        buf[#buf + 1] = collect_text(n.replace)
      end
    elseif id == HLIST then
      buf[#buf + 1] = collect_text(n.head)
    end
    n = n.next
  end
  return table.concat(buf)
end

local function linebreak_filter(head, groupcode)
  for line in node.traverse_id(HLIST, head) do
    local text = collect_text(line.head)
    text = text:gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "")
    if text ~= "" then
      texio.write_nl("TEXLINE: " .. text)
    end
  end
  return head
end

luatexbase.add_to_callback("post_linebreak_filter", linebreak_filter, "extract_lines")
\end{luacode}

% ── Typeset the paragraph ──
\noindent __PARAGRAPH__
\par

\end{document}
